_meta.note: intent -> response policy. mode: tts | beep | silent. texts can be a list (random pick). placeholders supported: {heard_text}, {total_moved}

texts: I am moving the tool based on your commands.
I heard: {heard_text}. I will follow your instructions.
Status: listening for commands and moving safely when armed.
I heard that you are in pain. I will stop and retract now.
Okay. Stopping and retracting for safety.
Understood. I will stop immediately and move away.
